notes: The relevant National Policy Statement is a designated POLICY STATEMENT (Planning Act 2008 s.5), not legislation.gov.uk content, so it has no fetched provisions — a framework node, not a statutory instrument. Confirm the exact designated water NPS and its designation date before publication.
publisher: Department for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs
title: National Policy Statement for Water Resources Infrastructure (designated framework)

notes: METHODOLOGICAL source only. Used to anchor the DEFINITIONS in vocab/ (veto_strength, modality, legal_effect) to the mandatory/directory doctrine at paras 2.57-2.60, and to supply official definitions of Royal Prerogative (quoting Miller [2017] UKSC 5), delegation, justiciability and fettering of discretion. NOT cited as authority for any power, duty or veto record - those cite legislation.gov.uk per the source hierarchy (A3).
title: The Judge Over Your Shoulder (JOYS): a guide to the legal environment in which decisions in public bodies are made, 6th edition

notes: Directory of arm's-length bodies with authoritative classification (Executive/Advisory/Tribunal/Crown NDPB, Executive Agency, Non-Ministerial Department). Rank-2 classification source (Annex A3.2). Raw xlsx cached under data/sources/raw/cabinet-office-public-bodies/.
title: Cabinet Office Public Bodies Directory 2023/24

notes: Cabinet Office Civil Service Statistics 2025 (accredited official statistics), position as at 31 March 2025. Rank-1 staffing source (Annex A3.4). Statistical tables ODS: Table 20/21 = responsibility level (grade) by organisation (headcount/FTE); Table 8/8A = profession by organisation (headcount/FTE). Figures rounded to the nearest 5; '[c]' = suppressed (headcount 1-4) and stored as no record. Departmental 'Overall' rows are the group total INCLUDING agencies (which are also held as separate bodies) — department group records carry a double-count disclaimer. Raw ODS cached under data/sources/raw/civil-service-statistics/.
title: Civil Service Statistics: 2025

notes: Per-organisation content items; links.ordered_ministers -> role_appointments used for current ministers. Raw responses cached under data/sources/raw/govuk-content-ministers/ by ingest_ministers.py. This access: 24 organisations.
title: GOV.UK Content API — organisation ministers

notes: Machine-readable register of public organisations. Fields used: format, parent/child_organisations, govuk_status, content_id, analytics_identifier. Raw pages cached under data/sources/raw/govuk-organisations-api/ by ingest_organisations.py. This access: 63 pages, 1255 organisations.
title: GOV.UK Organisations API

notes: HM Treasury OSCAR II annual outturn release (November 2025), raw database extract for financial year 2024-25 (file BUD_24-25.xlsx). Rank-1 budget source (Annex A3.3). Amounts are in GBP thousands. Records aggregate rows to organisation x budgeting boundary (DEL/AME) x resource/capital x COFOG function; net = sum of all rows, gross = rows flagged INCOME_CATEGORY='GROSS'. IN-YEAR RETURN and FINAL OUTTURN rows partition the year and are both summed (filtering to one breaks the totals). Raw xlsx cached under data/sources/raw/oscar/.
title: OSCAR Annual Data: 2024-25 (Outturn)

notes: The Department for Business and Trade's published list of UK regulatory organisations (UK & England, plus Northern Ireland, Scotland and Wales sheets). Anchors the functions=['regulation'] tag in the Spiral 1.5 bolt-on: a body is tagged 'regulation' iff it appears on this list (exact normalised name/alias match, no fuzzy matching). Guidance-tier official source; the functional axis is orthogonal to body_type and does not alter constitutional classification. Raw ODS cached under data/sources/raw/list-of-uk-regulators/. In Spiral 2 the tag becomes derivable from the statutory regulatory powers a body holds.
title: List of UK regulators

notes: The Privy Council Office's official record of Royal Charters granted by the Sovereign since 1155. Existence/classification source for chartered bodies that sit OUTSIDE the GOV.UK Organisations API (the org register excludes self-governing chartered bodies). Analogous to the GOV.UK Organisations API for the departmental family: it establishes the body and its chartered form; the specific charter provision is a Spiral 2 citation. Charter years for the bodies added in the Spiral 1.5 off-register tranche were cross-checked against each body's own published charter page.
title: Record of Charters Granted (Privy Council)
